E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

PLC_ECU_V1.4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7D8
Recv ID: 7C8
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 97
Func Name: PLC/PLGW

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "48",
    "supplier": "BT2",
    "soft": "0407",
    "version": "0600"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 49273,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Bus Off"
  },

    "name": "FAILED"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43805,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Loss of communication with EVSE"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43806,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "The charging process was aborted by the charging station."
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43807,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Protocol version too old"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43808,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Pilot Line OC (can be merged with SC+ or SC-)"
  },
  {

    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Protect Earth OC (can be merged with SC+ or SC-)"

  {

    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Charging process BCM lost communication"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 43781,
